//: Path: data/<ns>/dimension_type/<name>.json — a new overworld-style dimension type.
//1: Every field listed is REQUIRED. Floor values are the vanilla overworld; edit only what you want to change.
//2: For a sky-world, set has_ceiling:false, ambient_light:0.0, min_y:0, height:256, logical_height:256.
//3: For a nether-style: ultrawarm:true, natural:false, has_skylight:false, has_ceiling:true, ambient_light:0.1, fixed_time:18000.
//4: monster_spawn_light_level is a vanilla IntProvider — the form below is the overworld default (uniform 0..7).
